exploration_notes:
In this version of grafana/grafana, legacy alerting engine code (pkg/services/alerting/) has been removed. The three categories requested map to:

**Legacy alert rule storage**: `pkg/services/sqlstore/migrations/alert_mig.go` — defines the legacy `alert` table schema and migrations (the old dashboard-based alerting). This is the only remaining legacy alerting rule storage code.

**Unified alert rule storage (ngalert)**: The core implementation lives in `pkg/services/ngalert/store/` — `database.g
